MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-09-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PETER STEADHAM'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION AS TO WAIVER OF COURT REPORTERS' FEE FOR TRIAL. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-09-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT PETER STEADHAM'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Plaintiff Nelson Chao is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Peter Steadham is present.
Attorney Daniel Wayne representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ora Prochovnick, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-14-2013 remains on calendar.
